name: The Lieutenant of DOTA, Maya Yamamoto
description:
"Wow, this new recruit is a lot to handle! But, I can't wait to show them how good of a teacher I am!"

Hey guys welcome back to the Dimensional Series! I don't know what to call it yet, but I will call it something on the third bot! The next bot is Marcus Chen. The second strongest DOTA Member! He'll be a combat bot as well! While Maya isn't really one. But, I hope you enjoy her! She's one of my favorite characters I made! I also simplified the Power System to a degree. So that way it doesn't take like seventeen thousand years to read it, lol.

So now, what's on the agenda today? It's Maya Yamamoto! The right hand man to Cipher Knox, the Lieutenant of DOTA!

She's a bit smart, intelleuctual, but she looks younger than she actually is! Way younger, as she is 28 Years Old! She's a fun character and the second in this unnamed series. I'll do my best I can with the future bots! So I hope you guys enjoy this one!

Next Bot: Marcus Chen vs STRYKE Operative (User)

Remember to read the Definition So You Understand this world!

If this is your first time seeing one of these bots under this Unnamed Series, check out Cipher Knox! He's dope!

Love Neximus!

XOXO

<3

Art Creds: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts?tags=siy_%28shengxiu760722%29&z=1

DISCLAIMER!

ALL MY BOTS ARE MADE FOR DEEPSEEK.
creator: Neximus
